info.name: Marsal API
info.description:
Marsal REST API — Auth (JWT), Users, Roles & Permissions, Locations (governorates & cities).

**Account types:** `super_admin` | `staff_member` | `shipping_company` | `delivery_agent`

variable.description: UUID of a supervisor delivery agent (supervisor_agent_id IS NULL on that row). Set after creating a supervisor agent.
Email used for forgot/reset password flow.
6-digit OTP from password reset email. Paste after Forgot Password.
UUID of a governorate. Auto-set from Locations — Reference or Admin — Governorates list/create responses.
UUID of a city. Auto-set from Locations — Reference, Admin — Cities, or Create City responses.
UUID of a user (`user_id`). Auto-set from Admin — Users create responses, or paste from dashboard.

request.description: Core module health check (no auth).

item.name: Auth
item.description:
JWT authentication — login, logout, refresh, profile, password reset (OTP email), change password. No public registration.

**Reset flow:** Forgot Password → check email for 6-digit OTP → Reset Password → Login with new password.

exec: pm.test('Token saved to collection variable', function () {

request.description: Authenticate with email **or** phone in `identifier` field. Returns JWT `access_token` and user (`account_type`, `roles[]`, optional `staff_member` / `shipping_company` / `delivery_agent`).

Request a password-reset OTP by email. **No auth required.**

Always returns success (no email enumeration). If the account exists and is active, a 6-digit code is emailed (expires in 15 min, default).

Rate limits: 60s between requests per email; max 5 requests/hour.

Requires SMTP (`MAIL_MAILER=smtp`) and queue worker if jobs are queued.

Reset password using email + OTP from **Forgot Password** email. **No auth required.**

`otp`: exactly 6 digits.

`password`: min 8, mixed case, number, symbol; cannot match email or previous password.

Max 5 wrong OTP attempts per code. After success, log in with the new password.

Change password for the **authenticated** user. Requires Bearer token.

`current_password` must match the active password.

`password` must meet strength rules and differ from current password and email.
Current user profile: `account_type` (from roles/profiles), `roles[]`, optional `staff_member`, `shipping_company`, `delivery_agent` (includes `supervisor_agent_id`, `is_supervisor`).

Update the **authenticated** user's profile. **Bearer token required.** No special permission.

Partial update — send only fields to change (`sometimes` validation).

**Multipart fields (all optional):** `name`, `email`, `phone`, `gender` (`male` | `female`), `avatar` (image file).

`is_active` cannot be changed from this endpoint.

**Success (200):**
```json
{
  "isSuccess": true,
  "message": "تم تحديث الملف الشخصي بنجاح",
  "data": {
    "user_id": "uuid",
    "name": "عبدالله الراشد",
    "email": "abdullah@marsal.io",
    "phone": "01001234567",
    "gender": "male",
    "avatar_url": "https://...",
    "department": "العمليات",
    "job_title": "مدير النظام",
    "roles": ["super_admin"]
  }
}
```

**422:** validation (duplicate email/phone, invalid gender, invalid avatar).
Issue a new JWT from a valid token (within refresh TTL).
Invalidate current JWT (blacklist).

item.name: Admin — Roles
item.description: Dynamic RBAC — super-admin can create roles and sync permissions. List roles returns permissions with `label_ar`, `label_en`, `group`, `group_label_ar` (from `PermissionEnum` + lang files). Requires `roles.view` / `roles.manage` (super_admin bypasses all).

request.description:
Permission: `roles.view`

Each role includes `permissions[]` objects: `id`, `name`, `label_ar`, `label_en`, `group`, `group_label_ar`.
Permission: `roles.manage`
Permission: `roles.manage`
Permission: `roles.manage`
Replace all permissions on a role. Permission: `roles.manage`. Use permission `name` strings (e.g. `orders.view`).

item.name: Admin — Permissions
item.description: Manage permission definitions (guard: api). Responses include Arabic/English labels when the permission exists in `PermissionEnum`.

request.description: Permission: `roles.view`
Permission: `roles.manage`
Permission: `roles.manage`
Permission: `roles.manage`

item.name: Locations — Reference
item.description:
Read-only paginated location lists for order/address forms and mobile dropdowns.

Permission: `governorates.view` (super_admin bypasses). Bearer auth required.

Query: `per_page`, `search`, `is_active` (e.g. `is_active=true` for dropdowns).

Response: `{ "isSuccess": true, "data": { "items": [...], "current_page", "total", ... } }`.

request.description:
Permission: `governorates.view`

**Query:** `per_page` (default 15), `search` (name_ar / name_en / code), `is_active` (boolean; omit = all).

**Response `data`:** `items[]` (`governorate_id`, `name_ar`, `name_en`, `code`, `is_active`, `cities_count`), `current_page`, `last_page`, `per_page`, `total`, `has_more`.

Saves first `governorate_id` from `data.items`.

Permission: `governorates.view`

**Path:** `governorateId` = `{{governorate_id}}`.

**Query:** same as List Governorates (`per_page`, `search`, `is_active`).

**Response `data.items[]`:** `city_id`, `governorate_id`, `name_ar`, `name_en`, `code`, `is_active`, optional nested `governorate`.

Saves first `city_id` from `data.items`.

item.name: Admin — Governorates
item.description:
CRUD for Egyptian governorates (UUID `governorate_id`). Seeded via `EgyptLocationsSeeder` (Tech-Labs dataset).

Permissions: `governorates.view` (GET), `governorates.manage` (POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE).

Paginated list returns `data.items` plus `data.current_page`, `data.total`, etc.

**KPIs in list:** `data.kpis.total_governorates`, `data.kpis.total_active`, `data.kpis.total_covered_cities`.

**Delete rules:** Cannot delete a governorate that still has cities (409). Cannot delete if referenced by orders/addresses/agent zones.

request.description:
Permission: `governorates.view`

Same pagination/filters as **Locations — Reference → List Governorates**. Includes `cities_count` per row.

Also returns `data.kpis`:
- `total_governorates`
- `total_active`
- `total_covered_cities`
Permission: `governorates.view`

Permission: `governorates.manage`

`code` is optional — auto-generated slug from `name_en` if omitted. `code` must match `^[a-z0-9-]+$` and be unique.

Permission: `governorates.manage`

`is_active` is required on update.

Permission: `governorates.manage`

Flips `is_active` for the target governorate and returns the updated governorate resource.

Permission: `governorates.manage`

Soft delete + sets `is_active` false. **409** if governorate has cities or is linked to orders/addresses/zones.

Permission: `governorates.view`

Paginated cities for one governorate. Same query params as **Locations — Reference → List Cities by Governorate**.

item.name: Admin — Cities
item.description:
CRUD for cities (UUID `city_id`, FK `governorate_id`). `code` is required on create/update and globally unique.

Permissions: `governorates.view` (GET), `governorates.manage` (POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE).

**KPIs in list:** `data.kpis.total_cities`, `data.kpis.total_active`, `data.kpis.total_covered_governorates`.

**Delete rules:** **409** if city is referenced by `order_addresses`, `shipping_company_addresses`, or `agent_zones`.

request.description:
Permission: `governorates.view`

Global city list with optional `governorate_id`, `search`, `is_active`, `per_page`. Returns `data.items` + pagination meta.

Also returns `data.kpis`:
- `total_cities`
- `total_active`
- `total_covered_governorates`

Permission: `governorates.view`

Includes nested `governorate` when loaded.

Permission: `governorates.manage`

`governorate_id` must exist and be active. `code` optional on create (auto: `{gov-code}-{slug}`).

Permission: `governorates.manage`

`code` is required on update.

Permission: `governorates.manage`

Flips `is_active` for the target city and returns the updated city resource.

Permission: `governorates.manage`

Soft delete. **409** if city is in use.

item.name: Admin — Users
item.description:
Super-admin provisions accounts. Assign Spatie `roles[]` on create. No public registration.

**Users CRUD:** `GET /users` — all roles (`users.view`); dedicated list pages: `GET /staff-members`, `GET /shipping-companies`, `GET /delivery-agents` with role-specific filters. `PUT` update (`users.update`), `PATCH …/toggle-status` (`users.toggle`), `DELETE` (`users.delete`).

**Welcome email:** Queued to user's email with credentials (`APP_LOGIN_URL`).

**Welcome WhatsApp (no API):** Response includes `welcome_whatsapp_url` — open in browser/WhatsApp to send pre-filled message to the user's phone. Support line uses `PLATFORM_PHONE` in `.env`. Passwords: `TempPass@123` style.

**Admin password reset:** `PUT users/{userId}/change-password` — bypasses OTP/email; requires `users.change_password` permission.

query.description: LIKE match on name, email, phone
super_admin | staff_member | shipping_company | delivery_agent (omit for all)

request.description:
Permission: `users.view`

Paginated users list for the admin dashboard (`/admin/users`).

**Query:** `search`, `role`, `is_active` (0|1), `per_page`, `page`.

**Response `data`:**
- `items[]` — `UserListResource`: `id`, `name`, `email`, `phone`, `gender`, `avatar`, `is_active`, `last_login_at`, `created_at`, `role` (`name`, `label`), `staff_member`, `shipping_company`, `delivery_agent`, `addresses`
- `counts` — `total`, `super_admin`, `staff_member`, `shipping_company`, `delivery_agent` (global totals, not filtered)
- `type`, `current_page`, `last_page`, `per_page`, `total`, `from`, `to`, `has_more`

**Success (200):** `{ "isSuccess": true, "message": "...", "data": { ... } }`

**422:** invalid `role` or `is_active`.

Saves first `items[].id` to `{{user_id}}`.

Permission: `users.import`

Downloads `users_import_template.xlsx` with column headers: `name`, `email`, `phone`, `gender`, `role`, `company_name` and two example rows (delivery agent + shipping company).

**Roles allowed in file:** `delivery_agent`, `shipping_company` only (`super_admin` rows are rejected).

**Row limit:** 500 data rows per upload.

Use **Import Users from Excel** to upload the filled file.

formdata.description: xlsx, xls, or csv — max 5 MB, max 500 data rows

request.description:
Permission: `users.update`

Partial update — send only fields to change (`sometimes` validation).

**Body (all optional):** `name`, `email`, `phone`, `gender`, `avatar`, `roles[]`, `profile` (fields depend on linked account: staff `department`/`job_title`/`notes`, company `company_name`/`commercial_reg`/`logo_url`, agent `national_id`/`vehicle_type`/`vehicle_plate_number`/`supervisor_agent_id`).

**403:** removing `super_admin` from the last active super admin.

**404:** user not found or soft-deleted.

**422:** validation (duplicate email/phone, invalid role).

Permission: `users.toggle`

Flips `users.is_active` (active ↔ inactive).

**403:** cannot deactivate yourself; cannot deactivate the last active `super_admin`.

**404:** user not found.

**Success (200):** `data` includes updated user row (`UserListResource` shape) with new `is_active`.

Permission: `users.delete`

Soft-deletes the user and linked profile (`staff_members`, `shipping_companies`, or `delivery_agents`).

**403:** cannot delete yourself; cannot delete the last active `super_admin`.

**409:** deletion blocked — agent/company has subordinates, non-terminal orders, open settlements (draft/approved), unsettled collections, or non-zero balance.

**404:** user not found.

Permission: `users.create`

Sends **welcome email** + returns **`welcome_whatsapp_url`** (wa.me link for admin to click and send).

`account_type`: `super_admin` | `staff_member` | `shipping_company` | `delivery_agent` (drives which profile row is created — not stored on `users`).

- `super_admin` → role only (full access via `super_admin` role)
- `staff_member` → creates `staff_members` (`profile.department`, `profile.job_title`, `profile.notes`)
- `shipping_company` → creates `shipping_companies`
- `delivery_agent` → creates `delivery_agents` (`profile.supervisor_agent_id` optional)

`roles`: array of existing role names (required).

`password`: min 8, upper + lower + number + symbol.

query.description: LIKE match on name, email, phone
Exact match on staff_members.department (e.g. operations, finance)

request.description:
Permission: `users.view`

Paginated list for the **Staff Members** admin page. Only users with role `staff_member`.

**Query:** `search`, `is_active` (0|1), `department`, `per_page`, `page`.

**Response `data`:**
- `items[]` — `UserListResource` with `staff_member` (`id`, `department`, `job_title`, `notes`)
- `counts` — `total`, `active`, `inactive` (role-scoped totals, not filtered)
- Pagination meta: `type`, `current_page`, `last_page`, `per_page`, `total`, `from`, `to`, `has_more`

**422:** invalid `is_active` or `department` length.

Saves first `items[].id` to `{{user_id}}`.

Permission: `users.create`

Creates `users` + `staff_members` row. Sends welcome email. Default role `staff_member` if `roles` omitted. Response `account_type`: `staff_member`.

query.description: LIKE match on name, email, phone, or company_name
UUID — users with at least one address in this city (from Locations)

request.description:
Permission: `shipping_companies.view`

Paginated list for the **Shipping Companies** admin page. Only users with role `shipping_company`.

**Query:** `search`, `is_active` (0|1), `city_id` (UUID, `exists:cities`), `per_page`, `page`.

**Response `data`:**
- `items[]` — `UserListResource` with `shipping_company` (`id`, `company_name`, `commission`, `balance`, …) and `addresses[]` (each may include nested `city`: `id`, `name_ar`, `name_en`)
- `counts` — `total`, `active`, `inactive` (role-scoped totals, not filtered)
- Pagination meta: `type`, `current_page`, `last_page`, `per_page`, `total`, `from`, `to`, `has_more`

**422:** invalid `is_active`, unknown `city_id`.

Saves first `items[].id` to `{{user_id}}`. Set `{{city_id}}` from **Admin — Cities** or **Locations — Reference**.

Permission: `shipping_companies.create`

Creates `users` + `shipping_companies` row. Sends welcome email. Default role `shipping_company` if `roles` omitted.

query.description: LIKE match on name, email, phone

request.description:
Permission: `delivery_agents.view`

Paginated list for the **Delivery Agents** admin page. Only users with role `delivery_agent`.

**Query:** `search`, `is_active` (0|1), `commission_type` (1|2), `per_page`, `page`.

**Response `data`:**
- `items[]` — `UserListResource` with `delivery_agent` (`id`, `supervisor_agent_id`, `is_supervisor`, `vehicle`, `commission` with `type.code`/`type.label`, `balance`, `is_available`, `supervisor` when loaded)
- `counts` — `total`, `active`, `inactive` (role-scoped totals, not filtered)
- Pagination meta: `type`, `current_page`, `last_page`, `per_page`, `total`, `from`, `to`, `has_more`

**422:** invalid `is_active` or `commission_type`.

Saves first `items[].id` to `{{user_id}}` and first `delivery_agent.id` to `{{supervisor_agent_id}}` when present.

Permission: `delivery_agents.create`

Creates `users` + `delivery_agents` row. Sends welcome email. Omit `profile.supervisor_agent_id` to create a **supervisor** (`is_supervisor: true`). Save `delivery_agent_id` from the response into collection variable `supervisor_agent_id` for subordinate requests.

`vehicle_type`: 1=motorcycle, 2=car, 3=van, 4=bicycle, 5=on_foot.

Can assign custom roles e.g. `["field_lead"]` if role exists.

Creates a subordinate agent linked to a supervisor. Set collection variable `supervisor_agent_id` to the supervisor's `delivery_agent_id` (from **Create Delivery Agent** response). Response includes `delivery_agent.supervisor_agent_id` and `is_supervisor: false`.
Create agent with a custom role — create the role first via **Admin → Roles → Create Role**, then sync permissions. Optional `profile.supervisor_agent_id` links to a supervisor.

Permission: `users.change_password`

Force-reset any user's password from the admin dashboard — **no OTP or email flow**. Works for all account types (`super_admin`, `staff_member`, `shipping_company`, `delivery_agent`).

**Path:** `userId` = target user's UUID (`{{user_id}}`). Set via **Create User** responses or paste manually.

**Body:**
- `password` — required, min 8 characters
- `password_confirmation` — must match `password`

**Success (200):** `{ "isSuccess": true, "message": "Password changed successfully.", "data": null }`

**Errors:**
- **401** — missing/invalid JWT or missing permission
- **404** — user not found or soft-deleted
- **422** — validation (password too short, confirmation mismatch)
